items.title: Lebanon Announces Golden Visa Plans: “Not the Right Timing, Nor the Right Framework”
items.dek: "Her sharper objection is commercial. Wehbe asked who would commit US$500,000, plus US$50,000 a year per family member, to Lebanon when the same capital could g
items.body: "Her sharper objection is commercial. Wehbe asked who would commit US$500,000, plus US$50,000 a year per family member, to Lebanon when the same capital could go to countries “that are not on the FATF gray list, have not endured one of the largest banking collapses and alleged Ponzi-like financial crises in modern history, and are not still dealing with the aftermath of billions of dollars in frozen deposits since 2019.”" submitted by /u/BorderTrader [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US top court says Rastafarian man cannot sue prison guards who cut his dreadlocks
items.dek: The former Louisiana inmate argued his Rastafarian faith was violated after prison officials focibly shaved off his hair.
items.body: The former Louisiana inmate argued his Rastafarian faith was violated after prison officials focibly shaved off his hair.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Florida nurse charged with felony after striking fellow pickleball player in the head with her paddle during a dispute about ball retrieval. She gave police a fake name.
items.dek: Per The Smoking Gun, with court documents. The dispute was about the retrieval of a ball. Her online bio lists pickleball as one of her favorite pursuits. The b
items.body: Per The Smoking Gun, with court documents. The dispute was about the retrieval of a ball. Her online bio lists pickleball as one of her favorite pursuits. The bio has not been updated. submitted by /u/Hungry-Support5196 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk
